## Summary

- Describe the change briefly.

## Required Checks

- [ ] Secret scan passes
- [ ] Dependency vulnerability check passes
- [ ] Static security scan passes
- [ ] Minimum syntax check passes

## Security Review

- [ ] No new secrets, tokens, or credentials were committed
- [ ] No direct push to `main`; this change is going through PR review
- [ ] Any config or infrastructure change was reviewed for rollback impact
- [ ] Frontend/E2E behavior was not changed unintentionally

## Validation

- [ ] I listed the commands or CI jobs used to validate the change
- [ ] I noted any skipped checks and why
